phrases.text_local: Podes dizer-me onde fica a Baía 4?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH BUHEEUH KWAHT-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Bay numbers correspond to specific municipal bus operators.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Baía 4.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BUHEEUH KWAHT-roo.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a bilheteira para o passe 7 Colinas?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh PUH-ruh AW PAH-sih SEH-tih koo-LEE-nuhsh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à Bilheteira Central para o passe 7 Colinas.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh sayngt-RAHL PUH-ruh AW PAH-sih SEH-tih koo-LEE-nuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the Central Ticket Office for the 7 Colinas pass.

responses.english: Go to the Central Ticket Office for the 7 Colinas pass.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh sayngt-RAHL PUH-ruh AW PAH-sih SEH-tih koo-LEE-nuhsh.
responses.french: Dirija-se à Bilheteira Central para o passe 7 Colinas.

phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese transit staff prioritize clear, concise directions over pleasantries.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Baía 1.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BUHEEUH OOM.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BUHEEUH OOM.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Baía 1.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information desk is
phrases.text_local: Onde se encontra o posto de informações turísticas?
phrases.cultural_note: Tourist desks in transit hubs often share space with commercial kiosks.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, dirija-se ao balcão de informações junto à bilheteira central ou siga as placas.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh sayngt-RAHL OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, go to the information desk near the central ticket office or follow the signs.

responses.english: Good morning, go to the information desk near the central ticket office or follow the signs.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, dee-REE-zhuh-SIH OW bahl-KOWN DIH een-foo-ruh-muh-SOHNYSH ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh sayngt-RAHL OHW SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh.
responses.french: Bom dia, dirija-se ao balcão de informações junto à bilheteira central ou siga as placas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to top up cards
phrases.text_local: Onde posso carregar o meu cartão de transporte?
phrases.pronunciation: ON-jee POH-soo kah-heh-GAH oo MEH-oo kar-TOW jee trahn-SPOR-chee (liaison: oo-MEH-oo | jee-trahn-SPOR-chee)
phrases.cultural_note: Vending machines are standard for regional card top-ups in Portuguese hubs.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, use as máquinas junto à bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, use the machines near the ticket office.

responses.english: Good morning, use the machines near the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, OO-zih UHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh ZHOONNG-too AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Bom dia, use as máquinas junto à bilheteira.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Baía 4.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BUHEEUH KWAHT-roo.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH BUHEEUH KWAHT-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Baía 4.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Ponto Carris Metropolitana is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica o Ponto Carris Metropolitana?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POHNG-too kuh-REESH meht-roo-poo-lee-TAHN-nuh?
phrases.cultural_note: Carris Metropolitana operates suburban routes from designated terminal zones.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Ponto Carris Metropolitana.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too kuh-REESH meht-roo-poo-lee-TAHN-nuh.
likely_response.translation_en: Where is the Ponto Carris Metropolitana? Follow the signs to the Ponto Carris Metropolitana.

responses.english: Where is the Ponto Carris Metropolitana? Follow the signs to the Ponto Carris Metropolitana.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW POHNG-too kuh-REESH meht-roo-poo-lee-TAHN-nuh.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Ponto Carris Metropolitana.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to buy 7 Colinas passes
phrases.pronunciation: aw-LAH, OHNG-dih KOHMP-roo PAH-sihsh SEH-tih koo-LEE-nuhsh?
phrases.cultural_note: In Portugal, '7 Colinas' is a rechargeable public transport pass used in the Lisbon metropolitan area, including Cascais.

likely_response.translation_en: At the central ticket office, on the right.

responses.english: At the central ticket office, on the right.
